_comment: Examples of different time values for S3 deletion scheduling

immediate_test.description: Delete after 5 minutes, check after 2 minutes (for testing)

one_hour.description: Delete after 1 hour, check after 30 minutes

one_day.description: Delete after 24 hours, check after 1 hour

default_three_days.description: Delete after 72 hours (3 days), check after 8 hours

one_week.description: Delete after 7 days, check after 12 hours

one_month.description: Delete after 30 days, check after 24 hours
